name: Breadmaker Information
recipeIngredient: Turbo II B/M for $149.90 plus $14 shipping
recipeInstructions:
1. Consider purchasing the Turbo II B/M for $149.90 plus shipping, which makes bread in 2 hours.
2. The Turbo IV also makes bread in 2 hours and can handle bigger loaves of whole grain breads.
3. If DAK's phone number (1-800-888-7808 or 1-800-888-0800) does not provide sufficient information, consult alternative bread machine companies:
a. Hitachi new b/m (800-241-6558 x720)
b. Hitachi refurbished b/m (800-328-0609)
c. Maxim (800-233-9054)
d. National (714-373-7757)
e. Panasonic (800-545-2672)
f. Regal (414-626-8558)
g. Sanyo (201-641-2333)
h. Seiko (516-777-8600)
i. Mr Loaf & Chefmate Wellbuilt (516-365-5040)
j. Zojirushi (800-783-6270)
